scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.desktop:build:canary: npm run icons && vite build && electrobun build --env=canary && node scripts/collect-release.mjs
scripts.desktop:build:stable: npm run icons && vite build && electrobun build --env=stable && node scripts/collect-release.mjs
scripts.desktop:package:canary: npm run icons && electrobun build --env=canary && node scripts/collect-release.mjs
scripts.desktop:package:stable: npm run icons && electrobun build --env=stable && node scripts/collect-release.mjs
scripts.desktop:build:linux:canary: bun node_modules/.bin/vite build && bun node_modules/electrobun/bin/electrobun.cjs build --env=canary && bun scripts/collect-release.mjs
scripts.desktop:build:linux:stable: bun node_modules/.bin/vite build && bun node_modules/electrobun/bin/electrobun.cjs build --env=stable && bun scripts/collect-release.mjs
